seoTitle: How to Enter a Discount Code at Gumroad Checkout
metaDescription: Learn how to find the discount code field during Gumroad checkout, apply your promo code, and confirm the savings before paying.
intro: If a creator has given you a promo code, applying it on Gumroad only takes a moment once you know where to look. This guide walks through opening checkout, finding the discount code field, and confirming your savings before completing payment.

steps.heading: Open the product page
steps.body: Go to the Gumroad product you want to buy and start the checkout process.

steps.heading: Open the checkout panel
steps.body: Click the buy button to slide open the secure payment form.

steps.heading: Find the discount code link
steps.body: Look for a discount code or promo option near the payment fields.

steps.heading: Enter your code
steps.body: Type or paste your promotional code into the field provided.

steps.heading: Apply and confirm
steps.body: Click apply, then check that the updated subtotal reflects your discount before finishing checkout.

faq.question: Where do I enter a discount code on Gumroad?
faq.answer: Look for a discount code link inside the checkout panel before you finalize payment.

faq.question: Why isn't my discount code working?
faq.answer: The code may be expired, limited to a different product, or entered incorrectly, so double-check the details with the seller.

faq.question: Can I apply more than one discount code at checkout?
faq.answer: Typically only one discount code can be applied per purchase.

faq.question: Will the discount also apply to future subscription payments?
faq.answer: For recurring products, whether a discount carries forward depends on how the seller configured the offer.
